svg.text: Whole-genome homologous inheritance context with non-homologous winners
PAN027mat_vs_PAN010_joint: light-gray ribbons are exact same-chromosome mother-child homologous chains >=10 kb; colored ribbons are interchromosomal winners.
Light gray: 4255 exact same-chromosome chains >=10 kb; gray glyph width scales with chain length.
All tracks use native whole-genome coordinates collapsed into length-scaled chromosome-order tracks.
